ddls:
CREATE TABLE "specimens" (
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each specimen */,
  "catalog_number" TEXT /* Catalog number assigned to the specimen */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the family of the specimen */,
  "taxonomic_name" TEXT /* Taxonomic name of the specimen */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the collector of the specimen */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the specimen was found */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the location where the specimen was found */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the location where the specimen was found */,
  "earliest_period_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the earliest geological period of the specimen */,
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geological formation of the specimen */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the media associated with the specimen */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the specimen was collected */,
  "retrieval_method" TEXT /* Method used to retrieve the specimen */,
  "preservation_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the specimen was preserved */,
  "current_location" TEXT /* Current location of the specimen */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_formation_id FOREIGN KEY ("formation_id") REFERENCES formations ("formation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media ("media_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES collectors ("collector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_earliest_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("earliest_period_id") REFERENCES geological_periods ("period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimens_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "families" (
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each family */,
  "family_name" TEXT /* Name of the family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the family */,
  "parent_family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent family */,
  "classification_rank" TEXT /* Classification rank of the family */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("family_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collectors" (
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collector */,
  "collector_name" TEXT /* Name of the collector */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the collector is affiliated with */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the collector */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the collector */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the collector */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the country is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geological_periods" (
  "period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geological period */,
  "period_name" TEXT /* Name of the geological period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the geological period */,
  "start_age" REAL /* Start age of the geological period in millions of years */,
  "end_age" REAL /* End age of the geological period in millions of years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "formations" (
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geological formation */,
  "formation_name" TEXT /* Name of the geological formation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the geological formation */,
  "rock_type" TEXT /* Type of rock in the formation */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the formation in millions of years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("formation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "media" (
  "media_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each media file */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., image, video, document) */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the media file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the media file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the media file was uploaded */,
  "uploaded_by" TEXT /* User who uploaded the media file */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the media file */,
  "copyright_info" TEXT /* Copyright information for the media file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., curator, researcher, public) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the specimen */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the specimen was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location from where the specimen was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annotations" (
  "annotation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each annotation */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen the annotation is for */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the annotation */,
  "annotation_date" TEXT /* Date when the annotation was made */,
  "annotation_text" TEXT /* Text of the annotation */,
  "annotation_type" TEXT /* Type of annotation (e.g., note, correction, comment) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("annotation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annotations_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specimen_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen the version is for */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_author" TEXT /* Author of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_versions_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specimen_media" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen */,
  "media_id" INTEGER /* ID of the media file */,
  "media_type" TEXT /* Type of media (e.g., image, video, document) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_media_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_media_media_id FOREIGN KEY ("media_id") REFERENCES media ("media_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "publisher" TEXT /* Publisher of the publication */,
  "doi" TEXT /* Digital Object Identifier (DOI) of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of the journal */,
  "issue" INTEGER /* Issue of the journal */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Pages in the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specimen_publications" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "citation" TEXT /* Citation for the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_publications_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_publications_publication_id FOREIGN KEY ("publication_id") REFERENCES publications ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specimen_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site where the specimen was found */,
  "site_description" TEXT /* Description of the site */,
  "site_latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "site_longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "altitude" REAL /* Altitude of the site */,
  "geological_context" TEXT /* Geological context of the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_locations_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specimen_taxonomies" (
  "taxonomy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxonomic classification */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen */,
  "kingdom" TEXT /* Kingdom of the specimen */,
  "phylum" TEXT /* Phylum of the specimen */,
  "class" TEXT /* Class of the specimen */,
  "order" TEXT /* Order of the specimen */,
  "family_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the family of the specimen */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus of the specimen */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species of the specimen */,
  "authority" TEXT /* Authority for the taxonomic classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("taxonomy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_taxonomies_family_id FOREIGN KEY ("family_id") REFERENCES families ("family_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_taxonomies_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specimen_collectors" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen */,
  "collector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collector */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the specimen was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_collectors_collector_id FOREIGN KEY ("collector_id") REFERENCES collectors ("collector_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_collectors_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specimen_countries" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country */,
  "collection_location" TEXT /* Location where the specimen was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_countries_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_countries_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specimen_periods" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen */,
  "period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geological period */,
  "age_range" TEXT /* Age range of the specimen within the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_periods_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_periods_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("period_id") REFERENCES geological_periods ("period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specimen_formations" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each link */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen */,
  "formation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geological formation */,
  "stratigraphic_position" TEXT /* Stratigraphic position of the specimen within the formation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_formations_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_formations_formation_id FOREIGN KEY ("formation_id") REFERENCES formations ("formation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "specimen_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "specimen_id" INTEGER /* ID of the specimen */,
  "measurement_type" TEXT /* Type of measurement (e.g., length, width, height) */,
  "measurement_value" REAL /* Value of the measurement */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_specimen_measurements_specimen_id FOREIGN KEY ("specimen_id") REFERENCES specimens ("specimen_id")
)
